text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump reports the naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will go into effect at 10am tomorrow. "We have a lot of people. As you know, at 10:00 tomorrow, we have a blockade going into effect. That'll be 10:00 tomorrow. Other nations…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said that Iran is in bad shape and very desperate, reiterating that he will not allow Iran to have a nuclear weapon. "I think Iran is in very bad shape. I think they're very desperate. We had a meeting that lasted twenty one hours. We understand the situation better than anybody, and Iran's in very bad shape. And and just so you understand, Iran will not have a nuclear weapon. We'll not have. There is no way that they're gonna get they still want it, and they made that clear the other night. Iran will not have a nuclear weapon." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普报告称，霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁将于明天上午10点生效。“我们有很多人。如你所知，明天10点，我们将实施封锁。那就是明天10点。其他国家……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗目前状况糟糕且非常绝望，并重申他绝不允许伊朗拥有核武器。“我认为伊朗的状况非常糟糕。我认为他们非常绝望。我们进行了一次持续二十一个小时的会议。我们比任何人都更了解局势，伊朗的状况非常糟糕。而且，为了让你明白，伊朗不会拥有核武器。我们不会让它拥有。他们不可能得到它——他们仍然想要它，他们前几天晚上已经说得很清楚了。伊朗不会拥有核武器。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump reports the naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will go into effect at 10am tomorrow. "We have a lot of people. As you know, at 10:00 tomorrow, we have a blockade going into effect. That'll be 10:00 tomorrow. Other nations are working so that Iran will not be able to sell oil, and that would be very effective." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普报告称，霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁将于明天上午10点生效。“我们有很多人。如你所知，明天10点，我们将实施封锁。那就是明天10点。其他国家正在努力，使伊朗无法出售石油，这将非常有效。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: Hormuz Blockade Starts Tomorrow at 10:00 AM
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：霍尔木兹海峡封锁将于明天上午10:00开始

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Trump’s Narcissistic Rant: Slams Pope Leo XIV as “Weak”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 特朗普的自恋咆哮：抨击教皇利奥十四世“软弱”

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump criticizes Pope Leo XIV says, "If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican," and that he should "get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043499749626495400/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 特朗普批评教皇利奥十四世，称“如果我不在白宫，利奥就不会在梵蒂冈”，并表示他应该“作为教皇端正态度，运用常识，停止迎合激进左派，专注于成为一位伟大的教皇，而不是政客。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043499749626495400/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Rep. Eric Swalwell is suspending his campaign for California governor after multiple women accused him of sexual misconduct, including a former staffer who says she was too intoxicated to consent, as calls grew within his own party for him to step aside. He denies the allegations and says he will fight them. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 埃里克·斯沃韦尔（Eric Swalwell）众议员正在暂停他的加州州长竞选活动，此前多名女性指控他存在性不当行为，其中包括一名声称自己醉酒无法同意的前员工，同时他所在的党派内部要求他下台的呼声也越来越高。他否认了这些指控，并表示将进行抗争。推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says that Iran will be prevented from selling oil under US blockade. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普表示，在美国封锁下，伊朗将被阻止出售石油。推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump criticism of Pope Leo on crime and foreign policy. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043497151951786005/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普对教皇利奥在犯罪和外交政策方面的批评。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043497151951786005/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump lashes out at the Pope tonight, calling him "WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy." https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043496483681448148/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普今晚猛烈抨击教皇，称他“在犯罪问题上软弱，在外交政策上糟糕透顶。” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043496483681448148/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "Pope Leo is WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy. He talks about “fear” of the Trump Administration, but doesn’t mention the FEAR that the Catholic Church, and all other Christian Organizations, had during COVID when they were arresting priests, ministers, and everybody else, for holding Church Services, even when going outside, and being ten and even twenty feet apart. I like his brother Louis much better than I like him, because Louis is all MAGA. He gets it, and Leo doesn’t! I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s terrible that America attacked Venezuela, a Country that was sending massive amounts of Drugs into the United States and, even worse, emptying their prisons, including murderers, drug dealers, and killers, into our Country. And I don’t want a Pope who criticizes the President of the United States because I’m doing exactly what I was elected, IN A LANDSLIDE, to do, setting Record Low Numbers in Crime, and creating the Greatest Stock Market in History. Leo should be thankful because, as everyone knows, he was a shocking surprise. He wasn’t on any list to be Pope, and was only put there by the Church because he was an American, and they thought that would be the best way to deal with President Donald J. Trump. If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican. Unfortunately, Leo’s Weak on Crime, Weak on Nuclear Weapons, does not sit well with me, nor does the fact that he meets with Obama Sympathizers like David Axelrod, a LOSER from the Left, who is one of those who wanted churchgoers and clerics to be arrested. Leo should get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician. It’s hurting him very badly and, more importantly, it’s hurting the Catholic Church! President DONALD J. TRUMP." tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“教皇利奥在犯罪问题上软弱，在外交政策上糟糕透顶。他谈论对特朗普政府的‘恐惧’，却只字不提天主教会和所有其他基督教组织在新冠疫情期间所经历的恐惧——当时他们逮捕了神父、牧师和其他所有人，仅仅因为他们举行教会仪式，甚至在户外、保持十英尺甚至二十英尺距离的情况下也是如此。我喜欢他的兄弟路易斯胜过喜欢他，因为路易斯是彻头彻尾的‘让美国再次伟大’（MAGA）支持者。他懂，而利奥不懂！我不想要一个认为伊朗拥有核武器没问题的教皇。我不想要一个认为美国攻击委内瑞拉是糟糕之举的教皇，那个国家向美国输送了大量毒品，更糟糕的是，他们清空了监狱，把杀人犯、毒贩和杀手都放进了我们的国家。我也不想要一个批评美国总统的教皇，因为我正在做我以压倒性优势当选后所要做的事情，即创下犯罪率的历史新低，并创造历史上最伟大的股市。利奥应该心存感激，因为众所周知，他的当选是一个令人震惊的意外。他不在任何教皇候选名单上，教会之所以选他，仅仅因为他是美国人，他们认为这是应对唐纳德·J·特朗普总统的最佳方式。如果我不在白宫，利奥就不会在梵蒂冈。不幸的是，利奥在犯罪问题上的软弱、在核武器问题上的软弱，让我感到不适，他与大卫·阿克塞尔罗德（David Axelrod）这样的奥巴马同情者会面也让我感到不适，阿克塞尔罗德是一个来自左翼的失败者，他正是那些想要逮捕教会信徒和神职人员的人之一。利奥应该作为教皇端正态度，运用常识，停止迎合激进左派，专注于成为一位伟大的教皇，而不是政客。这对他伤害极大，更重要的是，这正在伤害天主教会！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统。” 推文

text: The Spectator Index Eric Swalwell withdraws from California governor race. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043494175031934990/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 埃里克·斯沃韦尔退出加州州长竞选。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043494175031934990/photo/1 推文

text: 📢 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 Trump lashes out at the Pope tonight, calling him "WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy." Pope Leo is WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy. He talks about “fear” of the Trump Administration, but doesn’t mention the FEAR that the Catholic Church, and all other Christian Organizations, had during COVID when they were arresting priests, ministers, and everybody else, for holding Church Services, even when going outside, and being ten and even twenty feet apart. I like his brother Louis much better than I like him, because Louis is all MAGA. He gets it, and Leo doesn’t! I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s terrible that America attacked Venezuela, a Country that was sending massive amounts of Drugs into the United States and, even worse, emptying their prisons, including murderers, drug dealers, and killers, into our Country. And I don’t want a Pope who criticizes the President of the United States because I’m doing exactly what I was elected, IN A LANDSLIDE, to do, setting Record Low Numbers in Crime, and creating the Greatest Stock Market in History. Leo should be thankful because, as everyone knows, he was a shocking surprise. He wasn’t on any list to be Pope, and was only put there by the Church because he was an American, and they thought that would be the best way to deal with President Donald J. Trump. If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican. Unfortunately, Leo’s Weak on Crime, Weak on Nuclear Weapons, does not sit well with me, nor does the fact that he meets with Obama Sympathizers like David Axelrod, a LOSER from the Left, who is one of those who wanted churchgoers and clerics to be arrested. Leo should get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician. It’s hurting him very badly and, more importantly, it’s hurting the Catholic Church! President DONALD J. TRUMP 📎 OSINTtechnical

text: Trump is insulting the Pope A low even lower than this Jewish slave can be
text_zh: 特朗普正在侮辱教皇，这比这个犹太奴隶的底线还要低

text: 🇺🇸 Today's "Who's Trump upset with?" game - the Pope! Pope Leo is WEAK on Crime, and terrible for Foreign Policy. He talks about “fear” of the Trump Administration, but doesn’t mention the FEAR that the Catholic Church, and all other Christian Organizations, had during COVID when they were arresting priests, ministers, and everybody else, for holding Church Services, even when going outside, and being ten and even twenty feet apart. I like his brother Louis much better than I like him, because Louis is all MAGA. He gets it, and Leo doesn’t! I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. I don’t want a Pope who thinks it’s terrible that America attacked Venezuela, a Country that was sending massive amounts of Drugs into the United States and, even worse, emptying their prisons, including murderers, drug dealers, and killers, into our Country. And I don’t want a Pope who criticizes the President of the United States because I’m doing exactly what I was elected, IN A LANDSLIDE, to do, setting Record Low Numbers in Crime, and creating the Greatest Stock Market in History. Leo should be thankful because, as everyone knows, he was a shocking surprise. He wasn’t on any list to be Pope, and was only put there by the Church because he was an American, and they thought that would be the best way to deal with President Donald J. Trump. If I wasn’t in the White House, Leo wouldn’t be in the Vatican. Unfortunately, Leo’s Weak on Crime, Weak on Nuclear Weapons, does not sit well with me, nor does the fact that he meets with Obama Sympathizers like David Axelrod, a LOSER from the Left, who is one of those who wanted churchgoers and clerics to be arrested. Leo should get his act together as Pope, use Common Sense, stop catering to the Radical Left, and focus on being a Great Pope, not a Politician. It’s hurting him very badly and, more importantly, it’s hurting the Catholic Church! President DONALD J. TRUMP 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The occupation army announces that two soldiers from the 890th Paratrooper Battalion were injured due to the fall of a Hezbollah rocket in southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 占领军宣布，第890伞兵营的两名士兵因真主党火箭弹在黎巴嫩南部坠落而受伤。

text: OSINTtechnical Israel's military is readying for renewed conflict with Iran after the US-Iranian peace talks collapsed -Times of Israel Israeli forces have moved to a “heightened state of readiness” and are preparing for a resumption of hostilities, with the potential that Iran strikes first. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 在美伊和平谈判破裂后，以色列军方正为与伊朗的重新冲突做准备 - 以色列时报 以色列军队已进入“高度戒备状态”，并正在为敌对行动的恢复做准备，且存在伊朗先发制人的可能性。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to U.S. Southern Command (SOUTHCOM), yesterday, SOUTHCOM’s Joint Task-Force Southern Spear conducted two strikes on vessels operated by Designated Terrorist Groups in known narco-trafficking routes. Per the release, in the first strike, two narcotics-terrorists were killed while one survived, and in the second strike three narco-terrorists were killed. Following the strikes, U.S. SOUTHCOM notified the U.S. Coast Guard to begin search and rescue operations for the one survivor. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据美国南方司令部（SOUTHCOM）称，昨天，南方司令部的联合特遣部队“南方之矛”在已知的毒品走私路线上对指定恐怖组织运营的船只进行了两次打击。根据发布的消息，在第一次打击中，两名毒品恐怖分子被击毙，一人幸存；在第二次打击中，三名毒品恐怖分子被击毙。打击后，美国南方司令部通知美国海岸警卫队开始对那名幸存者进行搜救行动。推文

text: The Spectator Index WTI crude oil price forecast to rise as high as $135 by the end of the year, according to @Kalshi prediction market. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043491055245709360/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据 @Kalshi 预测市场预测，WTI 原油价格预计到今年年底将上涨至 135 美元。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043491055245709360/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical President Trump is looking at resuming limited military strikes in Iran as a way to break a stalemate in peace talks -WSJ The US could also resume a full-fledged bombing campaign, though officials said that was less likely tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普总统正在考虑恢复在伊朗的有限军事打击，以此作为打破和平谈判僵局的一种方式 - 华尔街日报 美国也可能恢复全面的轰炸行动，尽管官员们表示这种可能性较小。推文

text: WarMonitor Oil surges after blockade warning and failed U.S.-Iran negotiations. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043489167082922022/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 在封锁警告和美伊谈判失败后，油价飙升。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043489167082922022/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index US crude oil price are up over 8%, now trading at $105. Brent crude also up 8%, trading at $103. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国原油价格上涨超过 8%，目前交易价格为 105 美元。布伦特原油也上涨 8%，交易价格为 103 美元。推文

text: WarMonitor RT @hissgoescobra : @ksadjadpour Uhh Iran has oil on the water plus a cash reserve bc we lifted sanctions. They aren’t even going to feel this necessarily for 30-45 days. They won’t let any non Iranian oil pass Hormuz, so the world oil supply will still be depressed. We inoculated them. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor RT @hissgoescobra : @ksadjadpour 呃，伊朗在海上拥有石油，加上我们解除制裁后他们还有现金储备。他们甚至在 30-45 天内都不会感觉到这一点。他们不会让任何非伊朗石油通过霍尔木兹海峡，所以世界石油供应仍将处于低迷状态。我们给他们接种了疫苗。推文

text: WarMonitor He can demand all he wants, but so far he hasn't accomplished a damn thing. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 他可以提出他想要的一切要求，但到目前为止，他什么都没做到。推文

text: The Spectator Index Reports of sirens sounding in northern Israel's Galilee region. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 有报道称以色列北部加利利地区响起了警报声。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Two Israeli paratroopers from the 890th Paratroopers Battalion were moderately injured after a rocket explosion in southern Lebanon. The soldiers were evacuated to hospital for medical treatment, and their families have been notified. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 两名来自第890伞兵营的以色列伞兵在黎巴嫩南部发生火箭弹爆炸后中度受伤。士兵们已被送往医院接受治疗，他们的家人已收到通知。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 | Sanctioned Iranian Tanker Company ships Iranian crude oil to India via supertanker ‘FELICITY’ for the first time in 7 years, according to TankersTrackers. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 | 据 TankersTrackers 称，受制裁的伊朗油轮公司 7 年来首次通过超级油轮“FELICITY”号向印度运送伊朗原油。@FotrosResistancee

text: ~40,000 housing units destroyed or heavily damaged in just 35 days — ≈16% of total war damage since Oct 2023. Most affected: Southern Beirut Suburbs, Nabatieh, Bint Jbeil, Sour. CNRS-L/NCNE continues evidence-based monitoring.
text_zh: 仅在 35 天内就有约 40,000 个住房单元被摧毁或严重损坏——约占自 2023 年 10 月以来战争总损失的 16%。受影响最严重的地区：贝鲁特南部郊区、纳巴泰、宾特朱拜勒、苏尔。CNRS-L/NCNE 继续进行基于证据的监测。

text: 🇺🇸 JD Vance says the goal is getting Iran to commit to not build a nuclear weapon. It already made that commitment in 2015 under the JCPOA—a deal T rump tore up. Now this admin has dragged the country into a pointless war to recover ground it gave away—and American families are paying the price.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 JD 万斯表示，目标是让伊朗承诺不制造核武器。它在 2015 年的《联合全面行动计划》（JCPOA）中已经做出了这一承诺——这是一项被特朗普撕毁的协议。现在，本届政府已将国家拖入一场毫无意义的战争，以收复它放弃的阵地——而美国民众正在为此付出代价。

text: ⚡️ 🇯🇵 🇺🇸 SCMP: NATO is set to send around 30 representatives to Tokyo this month for talks with Japan, highlighting deepening security cooperation between the two sides. The meetings are expected to focus on China’s expanding regional influence and Russia’s war in Ukraine, as well as broader global security concerns. The visit will also include discussions with Japan’s defense industry and comes as both sides increase coordination in response to shifting geopolitical tensions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇯🇵 🇺🇸 南华早报：北约计划本月派遣约 30 名代表前往东京与日本进行会谈，突显了双方日益加深的防务合作。会议预计将重点讨论中国不断扩大的地区影响力、俄罗斯在乌克兰的战争，以及更广泛的全球安全问题。访问还将包括与日本国防工业的讨论，正值双方为应对不断变化的地区地缘政治紧张局势而加强协调之际。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. Southern Command says Joint Task Force Southern Spear carried out two strikes on vessels linked to designated criminal groups along narco-trafficking routes in the Eastern Pacific. Five individuals were killed across the two strikes, with one survivor from the first strike, as U.S. authorities activated search and rescue efforts. No U.S. personnel were harmed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国南方司令部表示，联合特遣部队“南方之矛”在东太平洋的毒品走私路线上对与指定犯罪组织有关联的船只进行了两次打击。两次打击共造成 5 人死亡，第一次打击中有一名幸存者，美国当局已启动搜救工作。没有美国人员受伤。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇦🇺🇺🇸🇮🇷Australian Prime Minister Albanese says that Australia hasn't received an invitation from U.S. President Trump to support the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Reporter: "Trump says a lot of things, of course, but he also said this morning that numerous…" ⚡️ 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Australian Prime Minister Albanese emphasized that he wants peace talks to resume. "Well, I wanna see the resumption of peace talks. We wanna see an end to this conflict. It's having a devastating impact on the global economy. And the longer it goes, the bigger the impact will be and the longer the tail will be as well. And so we want to see an end to the conflict. We've made that very clear for some time." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇦🇺🇺🇸🇮🇷澳大利亚总理阿尔巴尼斯表示，澳大利亚尚未收到美国总统特朗普关于支持封锁霍尔木兹海峡的邀请。记者：‘特朗普当然说了不少话，但他今天早上也说，许多……’” ⚡️ 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 澳大利亚总理阿尔巴尼斯强调，他希望和平谈判能够恢复。“嗯，我想看到和平谈判的恢复。我们希望看到这场冲突的结束。它对全球经济产生了毁灭性的影响。持续的时间越长，影响就越大，后续影响也会持续更久。所以我们希望看到冲突结束。我们已经明确表达这一点有一段时间了。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Australian Prime Minister Albanese says that Australia hasn't received an invitation from U.S. President Trump to support the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Reporter: "Trump says a lot of things, of course, but he also said this morning that numerous countries are going to help with this blockade. Has Australia been asked to help?" Albanese: "We haven't been asked to help. What we have done is continue to provide support. I've extended the period of service of our Wedgetail aircraft in the Middle East that's providing defensive support particularly to The UAE and to Gulf countries that aren't participants in the war but have been victims of it as a result of Iran's unprovoked attacks." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 澳大利亚总理阿尔巴尼斯表示，澳大利亚尚未收到美国总统特朗普关于支持封锁霍尔木兹海峡的邀请。记者：“特朗普当然说了不少话，但他今天早上也说，许多国家将协助这次封锁。澳大利亚是否被要求提供帮助？” 阿尔巴尼斯：“我们没有被要求提供帮助。我们所做的是继续提供支持。我延长了我们在中东的‘楔尾’（Wedgetail）预警机的服役期，该机主要为阿联酋和海湾国家提供防御性支持，这些国家虽然不是战争的参与者，但由于伊朗的无端袭击，已成为受害者。” @wfwitness

text: 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 As Israel–Spain tensions intensify, Spain’s ambassador to Iran, upon arriving at the Iran’s Astara border, calls for “bilateral cooperation” and “lasting peace” — Fars. Adds that economic and investment relations will be reviewed.
text_zh: 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 随着以色列与西班牙紧张局势加剧，西班牙驻伊朗大使在抵达伊朗阿斯塔拉边境时呼吁“双边合作”和“持久和平”——法尔斯通讯社。并补充说，经济和投资关系将进行审查。

text: Didn't report what the Lebanese PM said today because I didn't bother read it. He is a nobody that isn't worth the dirt on a shoe used to walk inside sewage
text_zh: 没有报道黎巴嫩总理今天说了什么，因为我懒得读。他是个无名小卒，不值得用踩过污水的鞋底上的泥土来形容

text: ‘To avoid destabilizing the region’ Yeah buddy I got news for you…
text_zh: ‘为了避免破坏地区稳定’ 是的，伙计，我有个消息要告诉你……

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 NEW: A massive amount of aerial assets is going to the Middle East @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 最新：大量空中资产正前往中东 @Middle_East_Spectator

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 The Easter truce between Russia and Ukraine has officially ended. Clashes, FPV attacks have mostly ceased during the weekend with some exceptions. No glide bombs or drone were launched. This evening the launch of drones has already resumed. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 Ukraine and Russia both accused each other of ceasefire violations in the thousands as the Easter ceasefire came to an end. Ukraine accused Russia of 7,696 ceasefire violations in total. Specific violations include: 1,355 artillery strikes 115 assaults operations 6,226 drone strikes (1,677 Italmas, Lancet, and Molniya. 4,549 FPV drones.) Ukraine noted that no missile strikes or Geran-2 strikes were recorded during the ceasefire. Russia rejected that they hasd violated the ceasefire, claiming that all of their troops participating in the war stayed in their positions. They accuse Ukraine of 1,971 ceasefire violations during the Easter ceasefire, including four attempts to advance on Russian positions along the frontline such as in Kondratovka, Nova Sech, in the Sumy region (the latter of which they made two assault attempts), and Kaleniki in the Donetsk region. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 俄罗斯和乌克兰之间的复活节停火已正式结束。周末期间，冲突和 FPV 无人机袭击基本停止，但有少数例外。没有发射滑翔炸弹或无人机。今晚，无人机发射已经恢复。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 随着复活节停火结束，乌克兰和俄罗斯都指责对方数千次违反停火协议。乌克兰指责俄罗斯总共违反停火协议 7,696 次。具体违规行为包括：1,355 次炮击，115 次突击行动，6,226 次无人机袭击（1,677 次 Italmas、Lancet 和 Molniya 无人机。4,549 次 FPV 无人机）。乌克兰指出，停火期间没有记录到导弹袭击或 Geran-2 袭击。俄罗斯否认违反了停火协议，声称所有参与战争的部队都留在了各自的阵地。他们指责乌克兰在复活节停火期间违反停火协议 1,971 次，包括四次试图推进俄罗斯在前线的阵地，例如在苏梅地区的孔德拉托夫卡（Kondratovka）、新塞赫（Nova Sech，后者进行了两次突击尝试），以及顿涅茨克地区的卡列尼基（Kaleniki）。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: "Two soldiers of the 98th Division were moderately injured in a Hezbollah rocket attack in southern Lebanon on Sunday, the military says." This is the result of Hezbullah's main mode of attacks this war with concentrating rocket fire not Israel but on Israeli forces in Lebanon where they are known where and have no AD They mentioned two but give it a few days and you will hear that Israeli casualties are closer to 800 now. Last time it suddenly jumped to 500 when they were barely reporting a injury or two every other time However it stays painful for us that there are no Israeli army deaths (at least being reported for those who think Israel hides deaths)
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“军方称，周日，第 98 师的两名士兵在黎巴嫩南部真主党的火箭弹袭击中中度受伤。” 这是真主党在这场战争中的主要攻击模式的结果，他们将火箭弹火力集中在黎巴嫩境内的以色列军队身上，而不是以色列本土，因为他们知道军队在哪里，而且军队没有防空系统。他们提到了两名士兵，但再过几天，你就会听到以色列的伤亡人数接近 800 人了。上次伤亡人数突然跳升到 500 人时，他们之前几乎每次只报告一两名伤员。然而，对于那些认为以色列隐瞒死亡人数的人来说，没有以色列军队死亡（至少是已报告的）的消息仍然让我们感到痛苦

text: BREAKING: CENTCOM says the U.S. will begin a naval blockade of all ships entering or leaving Iranian ports on April 13 at 10 a.m. ET.
text_zh: 突发：中央司令部称，美国将于 4 月 13 日美国东部时间上午 10 点开始对所有进出伊朗港口的船只实施海上封锁。

text: And, oil prices up again.
text_zh: 而且，油价再次上涨。

text: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi: In intensive talks at highest level in 47 years, Iran engaged with U.S in good faith to end war. But when just inches away from "Islamabad MoU", we encountered maximalism, shifting goalposts, and blockade. Zero lessons earned.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希：在 47 年来最高级别的密集会谈中，伊朗本着诚意与美国接触以结束战争。但当我们距离“伊斯兰堡谅解备忘录”仅一步之遥时，我们遇到了极端主义、不断变化的立场和封锁。零教训可言。

text: Anthony Albanese, Australia’s prime minister, said the country hasn’t been asked to support a US Hormuz blockade.
text_zh: 澳大利亚总理安东尼·阿尔巴尼斯表示，该国未被要求支持美国的霍尔木兹海峡封锁。

text: 🇺🇸 US forced to reactivate aging refueling aircraft amid conflict with Iran, with at least two KC-135s pulled from storage after reported losses and damage to six tankers. One of them (tail number 58-0011) was built in 1958 — about 68 years old. — Bild
text_zh: 🇺🇸 在与伊朗的冲突中，美国被迫重新启用老旧的加油机，在据报道损失和损坏了六架加油机后，至少有两架 KC-135 从封存状态中拉出。其中一架（尾号 58-0011）建于 1958 年——大约 68 岁了。—— 德国图片报

text: Trump met with Florida Governor Ron DeSantis earlier today.
text_zh: 特朗普今天早些时候会见了佛罗里达州州长罗恩·德桑蒂斯。

text: 🇦🇺 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Australia joins the UK in refusing to participate in a U.S. blockade of Iran.
text_zh: 🇦🇺 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 澳大利亚加入英国行列，拒绝参与美国对伊朗的封锁。
